Dialog.name: MND_Temperance
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right now, the Temperance Arcana[n]may help me grow even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Looks like there's only educational manga here. Man, I wish they had some shonen stuff...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ah well. At least I have that one I borrowed from what's-his-name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Yo, you wanna read it too? It's this baseball manga that finished up a while back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0616_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Man, looks like they only got educational manga. I was hoping for some shonen stuff...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ah well. At least I still have that one I borrowed from what's-his-name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}You wanna give it a read too? It's this baseball manga that finished up a while back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0821_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}I thought just sittin' inside and reading manga'd help me beat the heat, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm still friggin' hot! ...But this manga's pretty hot too, heh heh. Wait, not like that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's this cool baseball manga that... Actually, why don't you just read it yourself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0824_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}No matter how bored I get, I don't think I'll ever touch any of the books here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Not much else to do, though... Well, there's that one manga I borrowed from what's-his-name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You wanna read it too? It's this baseball manga that finished up a while back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading the baseball manga with Junpei[n]could help improve my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2079 0 0}Hey, guess what! I just borrowed some more of that manga from last time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I got way more volumes this time. Carrying them all was a drag though...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0821_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2111 0 0}Damn, it's hot... It'd be nice to have something to distract me from the heat, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, right! The manga! I borrowed some more of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0824_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2114 0 0}Nothin' to do in my room, nothin' to do out here... Pretty boring, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, wait, I forgot! I borrowed more of that manga we were reading last time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading the baseball manga with Junpei[n]could help improve my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You wanna read some more of it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2002 0 0}Yo! I got the rest of that manga![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's gettin' down to the final inning! We gotta finish it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0821_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2007 0 0}Man, this heat is killin' me. I wouldn't be surprised if all these books just burst into flames...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, that reminds me, I borrowed the rest of that manga.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's gettin' down to the final inning! We gotta finish it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like Junpei has been[n]looking forward to this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading the baseball manga with Junpei[n]could help improve my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You up for it? If you want, I can bring 'em out now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}It's pretty relaxing just reading manga here, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You remember that we finished that baseball one last time, right? Well, I borrowed another one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0821_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Dude, it's so hot, even here. But I guess complaining's not gonna make it better...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}That's why I got the perfect thing to distract us from the heat! I borrowed a new manga series.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0824_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}What even are these books? They don't exactly look like something someone could read for fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Eh, whatever. I'll just read some manga. I borrowed a different series this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Junpei will gain any[n]more skills even if we read together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But reading manga with him could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You wanna get in on some of this manga action?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Aw yeah! That's what I like to hear![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2050 0 0}Eh, suit yourself. This series is tight as hell, though. Just sayin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}It's nice and quiet here, huh? I ain't like a huge reader, but this'd be the place to do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Junpei will gain any[n]more skills even if we read together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But reading manga with him could[n]help improve my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whaddaya think? Wanna read some manga?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reading the baseball manga with Junpei[n]could help improve my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Whaddaya think? Wanna read some manga?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're takin' care of the planters up top, right? Mind if I give it a try?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Girls are into slim dudes, right? Might be good to eat some vegetables after all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0801_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Hey, you doin' some prep tonight for that competition tomorrow?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if you got the time, you think we can go see what's up with those planters on the roof?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I just wanna check 'em out real quick.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Hey, uh... You think we should check on those planters up there?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know you're not supposed to give 'em too much water, but what if they're not getting enough?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0801_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}Wanna go check on the planters on the roof? It'd suck if the plants all died on us all of a sudden.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, wait, you have that competition tomorrow, huh? Well, we don't need to do it now, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not too confident doing it on my own, so if you're free, that'd be cool.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Hey, wanna head to the roof and work on those planters?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}I check on 'em once in a while, but I thought I prolly shouldn't touch 'em without you around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei seems motivated...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei might gain a new ability soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}So how 'bout it? You're free, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Hey, if you're gonna do some gardening, I'll come too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's actually a pretty good workout. I didn't think I'd get this into it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_500_0801_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2001 0 0}Hey, if you're gonna do some gardening, I'll come too. It's actually a pretty good workout.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Might be some good training for your competition tomorrow, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Junpei will gain any[n]more skills even if he helps me garden...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But the quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, let's build up a sweat and release some indoor fins. Or, wait... What're they called?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2067 0 0}Busy, huh? Well, if you ever feel like it, let me know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2009 0 0}Oh, change your mind? Alright, let's get upstairs, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem like Junpei will gain any[n]more skills even if he helps me garden...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But the quality of the produce might improve[n]if we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Can't really do it without you, dude.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The quality of the produce might improve if[n]we tend to the rooftop planters together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_THINK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What should I plant...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SEED_DAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like it can be harvested on {f 0 1 2}{f 2 4 1}/{f 2 4 2}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_NO_PLANT_DORMITORY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, I don't think I've planted[n]anything in the rooftop planters yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_CAN_NOT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I won't be able to harvest it[n]before the Promised Day, January 31st...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_PLANT_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There should still be produce in the rooftop[n]planter that has yet to be harvested.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should harvest those first...[n]{f 1 1}
